ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result entry */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the results were recorded */,
  "cc3dv" REAL /* CC3DV value, representing a specific simulation parameter */,
  "cc3dh" INTEGER /* CC3DH value, representing another simulation parameter */,
  "cc3dp" INTEGER /* CC3DP value, representing another simulation parameter */,
  "cc3difne_scalar" REAL /* CC3DIFNe_Scalar value used in the computation */,
  "cc3difne_field" REAL /* CC3DIFNe_Field value for field data */,
  "cc3statp" REAL /* CC3DSTATP statistical value from the simulation */,
  "cc3dirf7" REAL /* CC3DIRF7 value for directional parameter 7 */,
  "cc3dirf7p" REAL /* CC3DIRF7P value for directional parameter 7 (P) */,
  "cc3difn" REAL /* CC3DIFN value representing another simulation metric */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the simulation metadata */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the simulation result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulation_metadata ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_metadata" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the simulation */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON formatted parameters used in the simulation */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_result_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result version */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the simulation metadata */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the simulation result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_result_versions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulation_metadata ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameter_history" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the simulation metadata */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the simulation parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameter_history_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulation_metadata ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the simulation metadata */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulation_metadata ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the simulation metadata */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulation_metadata ("simulation_id")
)
